subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath caused the tongues of the eloquent to speak forth wondrous fountainheads and wellsprings of praise and thanksgiving, and Who is the Manifestor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله منطق السن البلغاء ببدایع جوامع منابع اذکار الحمد و الثناء و مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
